postToolUse.bash: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '(.file_path // .new_file_path // (.edits[0].file_path // empty))'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE"; fi
postToolUse.powershell: $file = ($env:TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty file_path -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($file -match '\.tsx?$') { npx prettier --write $file }
